headings: Evolution of Lok Capital from beginning to now
paragraphs: Lok Capital is a pioneering India-focused investment firm established in 2004. We have generated above market returns via investments into innovative tech-enabled enterprises addressing social and environmental challenges at scale. Lok Capital has a proven track record across funds of three vintages (2006, 2011, 2016) and is currently investing from its fourth fund into financial inclusion, fin-tech, food & agri-tech and climate & sustainability solutions.

The Lok logo accurately illustrates the ‘human’ touch that Lok carries at its core. It shows two human forms, one supporting the other to reach a goal they’re aspiring for. ‍ Having a combination of sharp and rounded forms, the logo represents both the empathetic and disciplined sides of Lok’s personality. While the human forms convey empathy, the white-space in the centre makes an upward graph denoting growth and capital returns which is held equally important in Lok philosophy.

We invest in early to growth stage investments into fast growing, high impact and tech-enabled business models in financial service, food & agriculture and climate & sustainability solutions in India. We like fundamentally driven business models that make commercial sense and do not shy away from investing in physical/ phygital businesses. In a context where financial gains and societal impact are perceived to be mutually exclusive, Lok strives to build companies that go beyond this binary.
Ticket sizes range from USD 3-18 million, with relatively smaller tickets for fin-tech, agri-tech, and climate/sustainability and larger tickets for financial services.

Typically, Series A to C. In most of our investments we play the role of the first PE-style growth investor on the cap table. We typically invest once product market fit has been established, there is proven revenue traction with some scale (say, proven unit economics in at least one geography/category), and a clear path to profitability - indicating the company’s ability to absorb growth capital. We generally underwrite for execution risk as against technology/ product risk.

Lok enjoys long standing relationships with a range of institutional investors including development financial institutions, private asset managers, insurance companies and reputed family offices. In addition to partnering with us in successive funds, our LPs have co-invested extensively in our portfolio companies helping provide visibility on capital to portfolio capital well into their late/ pre-IPO stages. Lok invites any institution that wishes to increase exposure to India, seeks best in class returns and is motivated by impact objectives.
Beyond our investment towards growth, we support our portfolio's capacity building initiatives by designing projects, identifying the right tools & partners, and absorbing a portion of the costs.
Supporting initiatives in tech, marketing, strategy, operations, sustainability and R&D projects.
Engaging talent from diverse backgrounds to contribute towards specific focus projects jointly identified by Lok and portfolio companies.
Subscribe to our newsletter to receive our updates.
By subscribing you agree to with our Privacy Policy and provide consent to receive updates from our company.

Company is committed to complying with all applicable laws wherever it operates. It is a core aspect of our mission that we act with integrity in all of our operations. We will not pay nor procure the payment of a bribe or unlawful fee to encourage the proper performance of a task or one which is intended or likely to compromise the integrity of another. We will not accept any payment, gift or inducement from a third party which is intended to compromise our own integrity. When contracting with a third party we will insist that they acknowledge our commitment to good governance and in turn expect them on best effort basis to follow similar standards. Any person who believes that Lok or their staffs are involved in bribery and corruption is encouraged to report their concerns our whistleblower officer at vmehta@lokcapital.com and/or compliance@lokcapital.com
